description: Manifest for direct user.pixel_map detector-day test definitions

tests.purpose: Probe ASIC-local orientation across ASICs 0-3 in one module using identical 2-point asymmetric markers.
Probe one anchor ASIC from each module using the same 2-point marker to separate module placement from intra-module orientation.
Probe the four quadrants of one ASIC to test whether the top quadrants receive an extra 180-degree remap.
Probe four 48-column regions of one ASIC without assuming the current bank-address interpretation is correct.
Probe multiple row bands of one ASIC to detect any unexpected vertical remap or row-address issue.

sequences.purpose: Short high-priority sequence for limited detector time.
Full detector-day run order covering orientation, quadrant, column-region, and row-region hypotheses.
